title: calonemorchis lodgeana
intro: Calonemorchis lodgeana, also known as the Lodge's calonemorchis, is a species of orchid found in Australia, specifically in the eastern regions. This epiphytic orchid has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calonemorchis lodgeana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
